# Gaurav Tanwar

Gaurav Tanwar is an elite AI Developer & Full-Stack Engineer based in India. He specializes in designing autonomous AI agents, fine-tuning large language models, building web game engines, and implementing premium 3D/WebGL user interfaces.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://www.GauravTnwr.me/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Gaurav1000m
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gaurav-tanwar-455066312/
- Email: gaurav1000m@gmail.com
- Location: India

## Core Skills
- **Artificial Intelligence / ML:** Deep Learning, NLP, LLM Fine-Tuning, Autonomous Agents, Neural Networks, PyTorch, TensorFlow
- **Full-Stack Development:** React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, Git
- **Graphics & Creative:** Three.js, React Three Fiber (R3F), WebGL, GSAP, Figma

## Key Projects
- **Drishti:** Advanced custom LLM chatbot supporting Bengali and natural language understanding. Built with PyTorch, Transformers, FastAPI, React.
- **RedxChess:** Neural network evaluation-based chess engine rated 3640 ELO. Built with Python, C++, UCI Protocol, Bitboards.
- **VoteChain:** Decentralized blockchain election/voting system using Solidity smart contracts. Built with Web3.js, React, Ethereum, IPFS.
- **Phoenix:** Voice-activated JARVIS-inspired desktop AI assistant automating OS workflows. Built with PyAutoGUI, Speech Recognition, OpenAI API.
- **Floodhub:** ML prediction model for India's river systems using TensorFlow and GIS.
- **Cinverse:** A movie streaming (OTT) web app featuring 3D UI integrations. Built with Clerk and Supabase.
- **HekTools:** Kotlin-based security monitoring research tool for Android.

## Professional Experience
- **Learning & Self-Development (2025 - Present):** Researching advanced AI architectures, neural search, and open-source packages.
- **AI Engineer (2025):** Chatbots, custom transformer training, LLMs.
- **Full-Stack Developer (2024):** Web architectures, Node.js APIs, responsive UI design.
- **Python Developer (2023):** Automation scripts, Discord bots, algorithm analysis.
